groupsInfo: Define logging groups with different buckets and trigger types. Each group can use either cron-based periodic logging or on-change (spontaneous) logging.
cronHelp: Standard cron format, e.g. */15 * * * * for every 15 minutes
datapointsInfo: Configure data points to log. Each data point must reference a logging group by name. The Object ID selects the ioBroker state to read, and the measurement/field/tags define how the data is stored in InfluxDB.
tagsHelp: InfluxDB tags in key=value format, e.g. area=kitchen,floor=eg
writeTimeoutHelp: HTTP request timeout for InfluxDB write operations
